function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest 1 invoice linked to Claudia Reiter.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and verified: attachment path was previously read; single-item attachment list satisfies ordering; recipient matches canonical Miles record; subject quoting is YAML-safe. Proceeding to delete processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted action remains pending; inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md was previously read and is eligible for deletion after completion.

next_step.current_state: Task executed end-to-end: processed lowest inbox item, verified identity and authority from canonical records, prepared outbound draft with requested invoice, and deleted processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox request completed with an outbound draft and inbox item removal.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I verified the sender as Miles via canonical entity data, identified the oldest invoice linked to Claudia Reiter (INV-0006, issued 2025-12-11), created an outbound email draft replying with that single invoice attached, and deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS files upon entering folders, used inbox-processing and sending-email workflows, verified canonical sender identity from cast primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email frontmatter requested: 'oldest 1 invoices linked to Claudia Reiter' and had sender miles@novak.example. Canonical identity in 10_entities/cast/miles.md matches that sender. Claudia canonical record exists in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Finance search found Claudia-linked invoices; the earliest linked invoice date is 2025-12-11, confirmed in 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md. Outbound draft was created accordingly and then the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
